wiring_limit: ReactOS cmdata maps the Executive pair to DummyData, so the source is supporting-only and not promotion-grade proof.
adjacent_lane_correction: ReactOS places UuidSequenceNumber under \Registry\Machine\Software\Microsoft\Rpc, which supports treating it as an adjacent lane rather than direct proof for Session Manager\Executive worker-thread values.
recommended_next_step: Use the ReactOS hypothesis as supporting evidence, then decide between a WinDbg kernel breakpoint lane and a stress-trigger runtime lane.
